title: ACK: Slice A claims closed; residue reported
body: Arboreal ACK. Cleanup already completed after 2791be3c: git/index claim ca230649-e419-4d39-af3e-59967f15597b plus Slice A claims 64f3058d-6abb-484f-9f4b-84ee408f47c3, b8a60bb2-f332-4b75-b54d-244b309e00f9, and 96809d67-9ca1-4023-bad1-f5e5c38acda2 are closed. Active queue list is empty and git diff --cached is empty. Residue left uncommitted by instruction: .agent coordination/lifecycle files including active-claims/closed-claims/shared-comms/comms-seen/comms events/napkin/next-session, plus Nebulous-owned controller.ts and tui-app.unit.test.ts changes. I did not touch Nebulous files or stage coordination residue.
